requirement_topic.zh: 2015-12号法下的可再生能源自发自用路径
requirement_topic.zht: 2015-12號法下的可再生能源自發自用路徑

summary.en: Tunisia's renewable-electricity framework includes Law 2015-12 on electricity production from renewable energies. PV self-production projects should confirm the applicable regime, authorization or declaration route, surplus-sale treatment, STEG contract or tariff handling, ANME involvement, and whether the inverter documentation is part of the technical file for the project rather than a standalone market-access approval.
summary.zh: 突尼斯可再生电力框架包括关于可再生能源发电的2015-12号法。光伏自发自用项目应确认适用制度、许可或申报路径、余电销售处理、STEG合同或电价安排、ANME参与方式，以及逆变器文件是否属于项目技术资料包的一部分，而非独立市场准入批准。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞可再生電力框架包括關於可再生能源發電的2015-12號法。光伏自發自用項目應確認適用制度、許可或申報路徑、餘電銷售處理、STEG合同或電價安排、ANME參與方式，以及逆變器文件是否屬於項目技術資料包的一部分，而非獨立市場准入批准。

standards_or_laws: Tunisia Law 2015-12 on electricity production from renewable energies
STEG tariffs for renewable-energy surplus purchase
ANME renewable-energy and PV program documentation

summary.en: Chinese domestic distributed-PV filing, grid-connection, and subsidy documents do not establish the Tunisian legal route. They may support project references but should not be presented as proof of Tunisian self-production authorization.
summary.zh: 中国国内分布式光伏备案、并网和补贴文件不能确立突尼斯法律路径。这些文件可作为项目参考，但不应作为突尼斯自发自用授权证明提交。
summary.zht: 中國國內分散式光伏備案、併網和補貼文件不能確立突尼西亞法律路徑。這些文件可作為項目參考，但不應作為突尼西亞自發自用授權證明提交。

standards_or_laws: Chinese distributed PV filing and grid-connection documents

gap.en: For a Tunisia project, confirm whether the legal route is self-consumption, self-production with surplus sale, authorization, concession, or another project category. The inverter supplier should provide technical documents in a format the developer can attach to the STEG / ANME / authority file.
gap.zh: 对于突尼斯项目，应确认法律路径是自用、自发自用余电上网、许可、特许经营还是其他项目类别。逆变器供应商应以开发商可附入STEG / ANME / 主管机关资料包的格式提供技术文件。
gap.zht: 對於突尼西亞項目，應確認法律路徑是自用、自發自用餘電上網、許可、特許經營還是其他項目類別。逆變器供應商應以開發商可附入STEG / ANME / 主管機關資料包的格式提供技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project falls under Tunisian renewable-electricity self-production, surplus-sale, authorization, concession, tariff, or STEG contract procedures
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese administrative approvals are not mandatory for Tunisia and do not replace Tunisian renewable-energy legal procedures

source.publisher: Société Tunisienne de l'Electricité et du Gaz (STEG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Law 2015-12 is a project-route issue. The inverter file should support the Tunisian self-production or surplus-sale application, not imply automatic legal authorization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 2015-12号法属于项目路径问题。逆变器资料包应支持突尼斯自发自用或余电销售申请，而不应暗示自动取得法律授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 2015-12號法屬於項目路徑問題。逆變器資料包應支持突尼西亞自發自用或餘電銷售申請，而不應暗示自動取得法律授權。
